chapter_title.ar: باب طَلَاقِ الْحُرَّةِ تَحْتَ الْمَمْلُوكِ وَ الْمَمْلُوكَةِ تَحْتَ الْحُرِّ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 74 – Divorce of the free woman under the owned slave, and the slave woman under the free man

text: قَالَ أَمِيرُ الْمُؤْمِنِينَ ( عليه السلام ) إِذَا كَانَتِ الْحُرَّةُ تَحْتَ الْعَبْدِ فَالطَّلَاقُ وَ الْعِدَّةُ بِالنِّسَاءِ يَعْنِي تَطْلِيقَهَا ثَلَاثاً وَ تَعْتَدُّ ثَلَاثَ حِيَضٍ .

en.hubeali: Ali, from his father, from Hammad Bin Isa,

(It has been narrated) from Abu Abdullah<sup>asws</sup> having said: ‘Amir Al-Momineen<sup>asws</sup> said: ‘When the free woman is under the slave, so the divorce and the waiting period is with the women, meaning he divorces would be three, and she would wait for three menstruations’.
